name: Medallions of Beef
recipeIngredient: 2 Ounces Tomatoes, peeled, seeded and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the beef in clarified butter until it reaches the desired level of doneness. Keep warm.
2. Cook the garlic in clarified butter to release its aroma.
3. Add tomatoes and demi-glace to the pan. Reduce mixture slightly.
4. Add tarragon and season with salt and pepper as needed.
5. Serve sauce over beef medallions.
